name: linkedin_discovery_scraper
title: LinkedIn Public Discovery
description: Find Google-indexed public LinkedIn profiles, posts, articles, or keyword results with transparent best-effort semantics.

seo.title: LinkedIn Profile, Post, and Search API
seo.description: Resolve indexed public LinkedIn profiles and posts, or search posts by keyword, recency, country, and page.
seo.intro: LinkedIn Public Discovery resolves profiles, individual posts, and keyword results through Google's public index, then normalizes the visible names, headlines, descriptions, URLs, author slugs, activity ids, and audience labels. It is transparent best-effort discovery rather than a claim of complete LinkedIn-native data coverage.

useCases.title: Topic monitoring
useCases.description: Find indexed LinkedIn conversations around a market, product, or emerging keyword.

useCases.title: Creator research
useCases.description: Identify public authors and post URLs before deeper review or enrichment.

useCases.title: Recent-post discovery
useCases.description: Apply Google's recency filters to focus monitoring on a useful time window.

faqs.question: Is this LinkedIn-native search?
faqs.answer: No. It explicitly searches Google's public index and returns the LinkedIn posts Google exposes.

faqs.question: Does it need a LinkedIn login?
faqs.answer: No. It uses public search results and public LinkedIn URLs without an authenticated account.

faqs.question: Is every public LinkedIn post included?
faqs.answer: No. Coverage depends on Google's indexing, so the result set is useful but best-effort.

mode.description: Search posts, resolve one profile or post, or extract a public LinkedIn video transcript.

query.description: Keyword or phrase to search in indexed LinkedIn posts.

url.description: Public LinkedIn profile, post, or article URL for profile and post modes.

cursor.description: Next Google results page number from a previous response.

country.description: Optional two-letter country for localized Google results.

post.description: One indexed public LinkedIn post or article

author_slug.description: Author slug inferred from the URL

transcript.description: Public LinkedIn video transcript normalized to plain text

transcript_not_available.description: True when LinkedIn exposes no public transcript or caption track

caption_url.description: LinkedIn public SRT/VTT caption URL when exposed

posts.description: Indexed public LinkedIn posts and articles

author_slug.description: Author slug inferred from the URL
